ChessRoom.title: ChessRoom
ChessRoom.description: A single real-time chess room match between two players or a player and bot.

fen.description: The standard Forsyth-Edwards Notation (FEN) representing the current board state.

turn.description: The active player color whose turn it is to move.

winner.description: The winning color 'w' or 'b', otherwise null.

whitePlayer.description: The details of the white team player.

blackPlayer.description: The details of the black team player.

moves.description: The algebraic coordinate log of all played moves.

chat.description: The discussion/conversation logs shared inside the room.

createdAt.description: POSIX millisecond epoch of room creation.

lastMovedAt.description: POSIX millisecond epoch of the most recent move.

timer.description: State of white and black player countdown clocks.

/rooms/{roomId}.description: Store live details, player pairings, turn state, and chat logs of a match.
